relations.note: Exclusivity rule governs when the main callout style may be used alongside others.
Both are sibling approved callout styles from the same formatting system.
Both are sibling approved callout styles from the same formatting system.

effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — no duplicate style types competing
effect.subject: callout style (main / secondary-data / text-heavy)

quotes: never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent visual redundancy and competing focal points among callout devices.
rules.rule_text: There are three approved callout styles — main (key point), secondary/data, and text-heavy — to be used judiciously; never place two callouts of the same style competing for attention on one screen or section.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text
Main callout (key point): Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.

rules.intent: Standardize the highest-emphasis callout treatment for key points.
rules.rule_text: The Main callout (key point) style is bold Brand Blue (#00529b) centered text flanked by Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below; rule weight is 2px, rule width spans ~60–100% of the text block, and 16px of padding separates rule from text.

quotes: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules
Secondary/data callout: **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon).

rules.intent: Standardize the supporting-data callout treatment distinct from the main callout.
rules.rule_text: The Secondary/data callout style is a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text, may include one line icon (e.g., a pill icon), uses 20px internal padding, and takes the callout accent-shape corner radius (large 42px / small 6px).

quotes: Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**
two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions): **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**.
two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

rules.intent: Standardize the text-dense callout treatment and its responsive column behavior.
rules.rule_text: The Text-heavy callout style (for lists/descriptions) is a Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint with a bold Brand Blue (#00529b) headline, line icons, bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, and regular Graphite (#212121) body text; it uses 24px internal padding and a two-column icon+text layout that collapses to a single column at the mobile breakpoint.
